items.name: botdrop-android
items.description: Run AI agents on your Android phone — no terminal, no CLI, just a guided setup.

items.name: Athena-Public
items.description: The Linux OS for AI Agents — Persistent memory, autonomy, and time-awareness for any LLM. Own the state. Rent the intelligence.

items.name: Sage
items.description: Multi-Agent System Framework For Complex Tasks

items.name: studio
items.description: Open-source control plane for your AI agents. Connect tools, hire agents, track every token and dollar

items.name: mlflow
items.description: The open source AI engineering platform. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI agents, LLM applications, and ML models while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

items.name: lobehub
items.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

items.name: solace-agent-mesh
items.description: An event-driven framework designed to build and orchestrate multi-agent AI systems. It enables seamless integration of AI agents with real-world data sources and systems, facilitating complex, multi-step workflows.

items.name: animaworks
items.description: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Ollama).

items.name: otter-camp
items.description: 🦦 otter.camp — Work management for AI agent teams

items.name: adk-java
items.description: An open-source, code-first Java toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.
